raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-directed affirmation and intention-setting to adopt a mindset of ease, non-resistance, and reduced habitual effort.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Effort is frequently generated by habit rather than necessity.",
    "Ease, rest, clarity, and flow do not inherently require justification or earning.",
    "Many situations are already simple without added complexity.",
    "Resistance to life/events is a choosable stance that can be released.",
    "Life can reliably 'meet' the speaker when resistance decreases."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; all lines share a consistent theme of shifting from effort/resistance to allowance/simplicity with no contradictions.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker experiences unnecessary self-imposed effort or resistance that, when reduced, improves well-being, clarity, or effectiveness without neglecting real responsibilities.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statements encourage passivity, avoidance of necessary effort, or denial of external constraints where active resistance or work is required for safety or progress."
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Self-directed affirmation and intention-setting to adopt a mindset of ease, non-resistance, and reduced habitual effort.
implicit_claims: Effort is frequently generated by habit rather than necessity.
Ease, rest, clarity, and flow do not inherently require justification or earning.
Many situations are already simple without added complexity.
Resistance to life/events is a choosable stance that can be released.
Life can reliably 'meet' the speaker when resistance decreases.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: Internally coherent; all lines share a consistent theme of shifting from effort/resistance to allowance/simplicity with no contradictions.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The speaker experiences unnecessary self-imposed effort or resistance that, when reduced, improves well-being, clarity, or effectiveness without neglecting real responsibilities.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: The statements encourage passivity, avoidance of necessary effort, or denial of external constraints where active resistance or work is required for safety or progress.
